svg.I:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     width="2" height="15"
     viewBox="0 0 2 15">

<polyline points="0,1 2,4"
    fill="none"
    stroke="#000000"
    stroke-width="1"
    stroke-linejoin="miter"
    stroke-linecap="butt" />
</svg>
